qa_pair.question: Which single product has generated the most total revenue across the entire dataset?
Which sales rep generated the most revenue in Europe during Q4 2025 (October 1 through December 31, 2025)?
In which calendar month did Voltaic Gear record its highest monthly revenue? Answer in YYYY-MM format.
During Black Friday week (2025-11-24 through 2025-11-30), which product sold the most units?
Which region had the lowest total revenue in the first half of 2026 (January 1 through June 30, 2026)?
Which sales channel accounts for the largest share of total revenue?
How many order lines (rows) are in the full sales dataset?
Which product category ranks second by total revenue across the whole dataset?
Within the Accessories category, which product has the highest total revenue?
Which sales rep moved the most total units in the APAC region across the whole dataset?
